author: mark
text:
Pass --config to auth-check and auth-setup

Plugins that target multiple instances need the config path at auth
time to know which instance they're authenticating against. Route
auth_check through Plugin::command() so it receives --config alongside
--auth-dir, and include --config in the re-auth hint balls prints on
expired credentials. Updates README plugin spec and locks the argv in
with a regression test.

Reported by a Jira sync plugin author.
